emails.subject: Eeegads...
emails.body: Eeegads... Don't know how I got on the list, but just got my invitation to the Western Conference of PUCs meeting June 3-6 where the guest speakers are Frank Wolak and Gary Locke. Oh dear.... Best, Jeff

emails.subject: RE: Eeegads...
emails.body: RE: Eeegads... I'll be there, as will Sandi McCubbin. Are you interested in going? I thought not. To: Kaufman, Paul; Landwehr, Susan
